Data Analytics Engineer | BI Engineer | Power BI & Fabric Specialist

Download full CV (PDF) LinkedIn

Profile

Power BI & Data Analytics Engineer with 3+ years of experience specializing in enterprise Power BI, Microsoft Fabric, operational analytics, and AI-assisted BI development workflows. Experienced in delivering scalable dashboards that support strategic decision making across telecom, manufacturing, logistics, finance, and executive reporting—with strong focus on operational efficiency, automation, and business decision support.

Experience

  • May 2025 – Present

    Power BI Engineer

    Global manufacturing / supply chain (Belgium)

    Data owner for 20+ Power BI solutions spanning supply chain, logistics, inventory, production, and finance—with SAP integration and AI-assisted development workflows.

    Read case study →

  • Jan 2023 – May 2025

    Specialist Regional Ops – Analytics & Automation

    National telecom infrastructure provider

    Designed and deployed 20+ operational analytics solutions for infrastructure monitoring, disaster recovery, SLA management, and workforce operations.

    Read case study →

  • May 2015 – Jan 2023

    Electrical Engineer / Plant Engineer

    Multiple firms — Sri Lanka

    Renewable energy, power generation, transmission, and manufacturing—including O&M for 3.3 MW biomass and 100 MW thermal power plants.

Education

BSc (Hons) Engineering — Electrical Engineering
University of Moratuwa · 2010–2015 · Second Class Upper · GPA 3.64
OTHM Level 7 Diploma in Data Science
OTHM, UK · 2024
